title: Savory Light Algerian Almonds Crumble
description: A light and salty Algerian dish featuring almond paste with a touch of smoke for hangover cure, crafted with low-sodium ingredients.
instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine the almond paste and smoked paprika. Mix well until evenly combined.
Add in low-sodium soy sauce, crushed cashews, chopped parsley, and dijon mustard. Stir gently until all ingredients are uniformly distributed.
Transfer the mixture to an oven-safe dish or baking pan that can be easily flipped over for serving.
Bake in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, flipping the crumble halfway through to ensure even cooking.
Allow the crumble to cool slightly before turning it out onto a platter. Serve warm as a snack with a side of herbal tea.
